title: LLM Observability, Evaluation, Experimentation Platform — Dat Ngo, Arize
summary: Arize offers both an open-source observability platform called Phoenix and an enterprise product with an AI layer called Alex. The platform enables observability of nondeterministic LLM systems through multiple evaluation signal types including LLM-as-judge, human feedback, golden datasets, deterministic checks, and business metrics across different scopes.
